case_title: GUADALUPE CENDEJAS VS. SHUKRIA JALALZADA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SUBWAY #27657

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENDEJAS, GUADALUPE AS TO DEFENDANT SHUKRIA JALALZADA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SUBWAY #27657 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
